subject: A humanoid rider atop a charging boar leading a stampede of boars through a city street
description: A humanoid figure rides atop the lead boar of a thundering stampede. The rider holds a long staff or spear aloft and wears a red headband with trailing cloth. The boars are large, dark, and armored with natural tusks, their red-tinged eyes glowing. The herd fills the entire street from side to side and recedes deep into the background. The setting is an urban city street flanked by tall stone buildings; green-yellow atmospheric haze fills the air. Behind the stampede, a mass of more boars and indistinct figures stretches to the horizon. Autumn leaves scatter at ground level. The scene is pure forward momentum and wild force breaking into a civilized space.
foreground: humanoid rider on a large boar leading a dense stampede
background: city street, stone buildings, green-yellow haze, trailing boar herd
emotion: wild exhilaration, unstoppable force, defiant charge
